name: create_kb
description: Create a named, persistent Knowledge Base backed by a dedicated ChromaDB collection. Returns a kb_id and a write_token — store the token securely, it is shown only once. Use ingest_into_kb to add documents and create_session with kb_id to query it.

name.description: Unique name for the Knowledge Base (e.g. 'scientific_papers').

description.description: Optional description of what this KB contains.

name: list_kbs
description: List all persistent Knowledge Bases with their kb_id, name, and description.

name: ingest_into_kb
description: Ingest a file or raw text into a persistent Knowledge Base. Requires the write_token issued when the KB was created. Documents ingested here persist across sessions and restarts.

kb_id.description: Knowledge Base ID returned by create_kb.

source.description: Absolute file path OR raw text content to ingest.

write_token.description: Write token issued at KB creation time.

is_file.description: True if source is a file path, False if raw text.

name: export_session_to_kb
description: Promote a session's documents into a new persistent Knowledge Base. Copies all chunks and their existing embeddings — no re-processing. Returns a kb_id and write_token (shown once). Use this after ingesting documents into a session to make them permanently available.

session_id.description: Session ID whose documents will be exported.

name.description: Unique name for the new Knowledge Base.

name: create_session
description: Create a new RAG session. Returns a session_id to use with ask, search_documents, ingest_document, and list_documents. Use mode_id='strict' to answer only from documents, 'chat' to allow the model's own knowledge too. Pass kb_ids (array) to attach one or more persistent Knowledge Bases. All attached KBs are searched automatically when answering questions.

mode_id.description: Session mode: 'strict' (documents only) or 'chat' (free). Defaults to 'chat'.

model_id.description: Model ID to use (e.g. 'local-qwen'). Leave empty for the default.

kb_ids.description: Optional list of Knowledge Base IDs to attach.

name: attach_kb
description: Attach a Knowledge Base to an existing session. The KB will be searched on the next ask().

name: detach_kb
description: Detach a Knowledge Base from a session. Documents in the KB are not deleted.

name: toggle_kb
description: Enable or disable a KB within a session without detaching it. Disabled KBs are skipped during retrieval.

enabled.description: True to enable, False to disable.

name: toggle_doc
description: Enable or disable a specific document (by doc_id) within a session. Disabled docs are excluded from retrieval across all collections.

enabled.description: True to enable, False to disable.

name: ask
description: Ask a question through a RAG session. Retrieves relevant document chunks, injects them as context, and returns the model's answer with source citations. Requires a session_id from create_session.

message.description: The question or message to send.

top_k.description: Number of document chunks to retrieve as context (default 5).

name: search_documents
description: Search the knowledge base using hybrid semantic + BM25 retrieval. Returns raw chunks with scores and source citations. Pass a session_id to search only that session's documents; omit it to search the global knowledge base.

query.description: The natural language question or search query.

session_id.description: Optional session ID to scope the search to that session's documents.

name: ingest_document
description: Ingest a document into the knowledge base. Accepts either a file path (PDF, MD, TXT) or raw text content. Pass a session_id to scope it to a session; omit to store globally.

source.description: Absolute file path OR raw text content to ingest.

is_file.description: True if source is a file path, False if raw text.

session_id.description: Optional session ID to scope ingestion to that session.

name: list_documents
description: List all documents in the knowledge base with titles, sources, and chunk counts. Pass a session_id to list only that session's documents; omit to list the global knowledge base.

session_id.description: Optional session ID to list only that session's documents.
